Properties.desc: 感知扭曲空间的裂隙，投射物在现实与幻境之间穿梭，速度提升{SpeedPercent}%，如被古神之力牵引般疾驰而过，留下幽暗的残影轨迹（加速系数: {AccelerationFactor}）
Properties.callWords: moba game icon, square composition, centered dark purple ethereal arrow piercing through distorted space-time vortex, glowing cyan speed lines radiating outward, deep black background with subtle cosmic nebula, golden ornate border frame, top-down view, spectral void particle trails, eldritch runes floating around edges, dramatic lighting with highlight on arrow tip, professional game UI design
